datasheet.text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase , when a friendly T’AU EMPIRE unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).
datasheet.name: Drone Escort

unit_composition.text: burst cannon; markerlight; close combat weapon.
unit_composition.label: Every model is equipped with

entries.label: Any number of models can each have their burst cannon and markerlight replaced with 1 twin burst cannon.
